---
title: "Francisco Velez"
subtitle: "Clinical Informaticist | Aspiring Marine Scientist | Data Analyst"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/velezf
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/francisco-velez-86028315/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:francisco.velez.v@gmail.com
---

## Welcome

I'm a clinical informaticist working at the intersection of clinical research, data science, and primary data collection. My work focuses on building systems, workflows, and data platforms that support researchers across a wide range of scientific and operational needs. I'm currently expanding my scope into marine science, GIS, remote sensing, full-stack software development, and hardware engineering. Outside of work, I apply the same data and engineering mindset to cycling analytics, high-power rocketry, ham radio, Arduino-based systems, and embedded telemetry projects.

## Research Interests

- Coral reef monitoring and benthic habitat mapping
- Structure-from-Motion photogrammetry for marine applications
- Geospatial data visualization and analysis
- IoT and radio telemetry systems

## Recent Projects

Check out my [Projects](projects.qmd) page for a full overview of my work.
